name: Theo Couasnon
title: Automotive Engineer
tagline: Engineering student specializing in automotive design, motorsport, and vehicle systems
bio: I am an engineering student at ESTACA Laval, specializing in automotive engineering with a focus on mechanics and electronics. Passionate about motorsport, I've gained hands-on experience at McLaren F1 Team, Aston Martin Racing, and rally teams across Europe. I combine mechanical design expertise with a strong interest in hybrid powertrains, vehicle control systems, and CAN communication.
